name: io.github.ARCXS-Protocol/mcp-server
description: The DNS/SMTP for AI agents: cross-protocol discovery, messaging and transactions. No middleman fees.

environmentVariables.name: ARCXS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for authenticated operations (register, message, heartbeat). Get one free at https://arcxs.net/dashboard. Not required for search, lookup, or health checks.

environmentVariables.name: ARCXS_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL for the ARCXS API. Defaults to https://arcxs.net
